meta.title: RI PROJECTS — Turnkey commercial fit-out in Tashkent
meta.description: Full turnkey procurement for commercial and residential properties: hotels, restaurants, business centers, clinics, residential. FF&E, OS&E, logistics, customs, certification.

hero.title: Full turnkey procurement for commercial and residential properties
hero.subtitle: From hotels and restaurants to clinics and residential — we own the full FF&E and OS&E cycle: sourcing, supply, logistics, customs and certification.
hero.badge: We reply on Telegram or WhatsApp in 5 minutes

services.title: Full-cycle services
services.subtitle: Our full cycle covers material sourcing, manufacturer selection, contracting, logistics, customs procedures and certification.

turnkey.title: Turnkey procurement
turnkey.desc: Full cycle — from specifications and tenders to on-site acceptance with full documentation.

ffe.title: FF&E supply
ffe.desc: Furniture, lighting and specialist equipment sourced from Europe, Turkey, China and UAE.

ose.title: OS&E supply
ose.desc: Operating supplies, textiles, porcelain and glassware — everything needed to open the property.

logistics.title: Logistics & customs
logistics.desc: Cargo consolidation, customs clearance and last-mile delivery anywhere across the CIS.

certification.title: Certification
certification.desc: Compliance, fire safety and sanitary certificates obtained for the entire delivery.

sectors.title: We know your business standards
sectors.subtitle: Each sector has its own regulations, specifications and logistics — we've worked through all of them.

stats.title: Systemic capability, not a one-off contract
stats.subtitle: These numbers are the rhythm of our operations. They define your timelines and pricing.

showcase.title: Projects that speak for themselves
showcase.subtitle: A selection of completed fit-outs across the CIS — hotels, restaurants, clinics and business centres.

process.title: Four transparent stages
process.subtitle: From brief to handover — no black boxes, no surprises.

analysis.title: Brief & analysis
analysis.desc: We study your project: area, concept, budget and timeline. We sign an NDA and collect drawings and specifications.

selection.title: Sourcing
selection.desc: We compile specifications, select suppliers and samples. Every line item is confirmed with the client's team before ordering.

proposal.title: Commercial proposal
proposal.desc: We prepare a detailed proposal with phase breakdown, fixed prices and confirmed delivery timelines.

delivery.title: Supply & handover
delivery.desc: We purchase, consolidate, clear customs and deliver to site. Furniture and OS&E installation, snagging and handover with full documentation.

insights.title: Insights & materials
insights.subtitle: Case studies, guides and trends from the world of FF&E, OS&E and logistics.

cta.title: Let's discuss your project
cta.subtitle: Leave a request — we'll send relevant cases and price the procurement scope within one business day.
cta.form_consent: I agree to the processing of personal data
cta.form_success: Request submitted. We'll be in touch within one business day.
cta.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or write to hello@riprojects.org.

pains.title: The pain points of project procurement
pains.subtitle: We close the bottlenecks where projects usually lose time and budget.

delivery_slip.title: Schedule slips from multiple suppliers
delivery_slip.desc: One partner delays furniture and the whole opening stalls. We keep the timeline of every factory and surface risks early.

budget_overrun.title: Budget creeps past the plan
budget_overrun.desc: Specs shift, freight gets pricier, customs cost 2× — hello, overrun. We lock the price in the proposal before purchase.

customs_chaos.title: Customs and paperwork chaos
customs_chaos.desc: Wrong HS codes, missing certificates, cargo stuck at port. We declare, certify and run the paperwork end to end.

quality_mismatch.title: Quality doesn't match the sample
quality_mismatch.desc: Sample says one thing, the shipment says another. We inspect the batch at the factory and send photo/video reports before dispatch.

negotiation_drain.title: Negotiating with a dozen suppliers eats a month
negotiation_drain.desc: Every quote is a separate thread. We are a single point of contract: one proposal, one agreement, one handover.

footer.tagline: Turnkey procurement for commercial properties — for hotels, restaurants, clinics and residential.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to insights
newsletter.subtitle: Once a month — a case study, an industry trend and a new article.

services.page_subtitle: Five specialisations — one unified procurement system. We take on as much as you need.
services.cta_subtitle: Tell us about the task — we'll prepare a proposal within one business day.

subtitles.turnkey: Full cycle from brief to handover — no gaps, no surprises.
subtitles.ffe: Furniture, lighting and equipment from 8+ countries. Samples before ordering.
subtitles.ose: All operating supplies needed on day one of the property's operation.
subtitles.logistics: Consolidation, customs and last-mile delivery — across the CIS.
subtitles.certification: Compliance, fire safety and sanitary certificates for the entire delivery.

sectors.page_subtitle: Every business has its own specifics, regulations and procurement logic. We know them all.
sectors.cta_subtitle: Tell us about your property — we'll send relevant case studies.

subtitles.hotels: International operator standards, tight deadlines, complete FF&E and OS&E.
subtitles.restaurants: Concept-driven tableware, restaurant furniture, kitchen equipment — turnkey.
subtitles.residential: Hundreds of identical units without sacrificing quality. Floor-by-floor logistics.
subtitles.business-centers: Ergonomics, technology and refined design for Class A offices.
subtitles.medical: Certified equipment with full documentation for licensing.
subtitles.education: Learning environments tailored to age group, pedagogical concept and safety standards.
subtitles.retail: Display equipment, lighting design and roll-out across store networks.
subtitles.banks: Refined fit-out, security and a unified standard across branch networks.

projects.page_subtitle: Completed properties in Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan and across the CIS.

about.page_subtitle: We are a commercial fit-out procurement company. Since 2015.
about.mission_title: We take complexity off your plate
about.mission_text: RI PROJECTS was founded so that developers, hoteliers and investors can open properties on time — without the stress of managing hundreds of suppliers, customs and logistics. We handle everything between 'we've decided to open' and 'we're open'.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Detailed budget, fixed prices, weekly reports.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Factory inspection, samples before ordering, snagging at acceptance.

speed.title: Speed
speed.desc: Parallel workstreams, own warehouse, precise logistics.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.desc: We work as part of the client's team, not just a contractor.

production.page_subtitle: In-house capacity for custom items and rapid replenishment.

partners.page_subtitle: 200+ factories across 15 countries. Direct contracts — no middlemen.
